query:
SELECT 
  mi.id as item_id, mi.name as item_name,
  cg.id as group_id, cg.name as group_name,
  co.id as opt_id, co.name as opt_name, co.priceExtra
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.menuItemId = mi.id
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id
WHERE mi.name IN ('Marmitex Tradicional P', 'Marmitex Tradicional M', 'Marmitex Tradicional G')
  AND (cg.name LIKE '%Trocar%' OR cg.name LIKE '%Substitua%' OR cg.name LIKE '%Alterar%')
ORDER BY mi.name, cg.name, co.name;
